recipes.title: Creamy Tomato Rosa Chicken Pasta
instructions: Boil Pasta: Cook pasta in salted water. Reserve 1 cup of pasta water before draining.
Sear Chicken: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high. Season chicken with salt, pepper, garlic powder, and half the Italian seasoning. Sauté until cooked through; remove and set aside.
Sauté Veggies: In the same skillet, cook stir-fry vegetables until tender-crisp.
Simmer Sauce: Lower heat. Add tomato sauce, cream cheese, honey, and remaining Italian seasoning. Stir until cream cheese is fully melted and sauce is pink.
Combine: Fold in the cooked pasta and chicken. Add reserved pasta water in small splashes until the sauce is glossy and coats everything evenly.
Finish: Stir in Parmesan cheese. Serve immediately.
